name: Google Analytics
description: Tells Google how long you spent on this page, what you clicked, and where you came from.

name: Google Tag Manager
description: A hub that loads other tracking scripts onto the page on Google's behalf.

name: Google Ads
description: Tracks whether you clicked a Google ad and what you did after — used to bill advertisers and target you.

name: Facebook Pixel
description: Reports your actions on this site back to Facebook so it can target you with ads and track ad conversions.

name: Instagram / Meta
description: Loads Meta social features and can track your browsing even if you're not logged into Instagram.

name: Twitter / X Pixel
description: Tells X/Twitter what pages you visit so it can link your browsing to your Twitter account for ad targeting.

name: LinkedIn Insight Tag
description: Tracks your visits to build a professional profile of your browsing habits for LinkedIn ad targeting.

name: TikTok Pixel
description: Reports your activity on this site to TikTok for ad targeting and conversion tracking.

name: Pinterest Tag
description: Tracks what you do after seeing a Pinterest ad, and helps Pinterest target you with more ads.

name: Snapchat Pixel
description: Connects your actions on this site to your Snapchat account for ad targeting.

name: Reddit Pixel
description: Tells Reddit what you did on this site so it can link your browsing to your Reddit account.

name: Hotjar
description: Records your mouse movements, scrolling, and clicks — essentially a video of your session on this site.

name: Microsoft Clarity
description: Microsoft's session recording tool — watches how you navigate the page including heatmaps and replays.

name: Bing Ads / Microsoft Ads
description: Tracks conversions from Bing/Microsoft ads and helps Microsoft target you with ads across the web.

name: Mixpanel
description: Tracks detailed events (button clicks, form submissions, page views) to analyze how you use the product.

name: Amplitude
description: Logs detailed product analytics — which features you use, how often, and in what order.

name: Segment
description: A data pipeline that collects your behavior and sends it to dozens of other analytics and ad platforms.

name: Heap
description: Automatically records every click, tap, and page view without the site needing to tag individual events.

name: FullStory
description: Records complete session replays of your visit — every mouse move, scroll, and click.

name: LogRocket
description: Records session replays and performance data — a detailed log of everything you did on the page.

name: Mouseflow
description: Records your mouse movements and creates heatmaps showing where users look and click.

name: Crazy Egg
description: Tracks clicks and scrolling to generate heatmaps of how users interact with the page.

name: Optimizely
description: Runs A/B tests by showing different versions of the page to different users — and tracks your behavior in each.

name: VWO
description: Runs A/B tests and records how different users interact with page variations.

name: Criteo
description: A retargeting ad network — if you looked at a product, Criteo shows you that product as an ad elsewhere on the web.

name: Outbrain
description: Powers the 'You may also like' sponsored content links at the bottom of articles — and tracks which ones you click.

name: Taboola
description: Serves sponsored 'recommended content' widgets and tracks your engagement to target you elsewhere.

name: Amazon Ads
description: Tracks your browsing so Amazon can show you relevant ads both on and off Amazon.

name: Quantcast
description: Collects data about your demographics and interests to help advertisers target audiences like you.

name: Intercom
description: Powers the live chat widget — also tracks your activity on the site to personalize support conversations.

name: Zendesk
description: Customer support chat and ticketing — tracks your interactions to manage support history.

name: Drift
description: A chatbot and live chat tool that also identifies you as a sales lead and tracks your site activity.

name: HubSpot
description: Tracks your visits and form submissions to build a sales/marketing profile about you in their CRM.

name: Salesforce / Pardot
description: Marketing automation that links your browsing behavior to your email address if you've ever filled out a form.

name: Marketo
description: Marketing automation that tracks your visits and scores you as a potential customer for sales teams.

name: AddThis
description: Social sharing buttons that also track your browsing across every site that uses them.

name: ShareThis
description: Social sharing widget that tracks which articles you read and share.

name: Disqus
description: Comment system that tracks your reading and commenting behavior across all sites using Disqus.

name: Yandex Metrica
description: Russian analytics platform that records session replays and tracks visitor behavior in detail.

name: New Relic
description: Performance monitoring that collects browser timing data — less about you, more about the site's speed.

name: Datadog RUM
description: Real user monitoring that logs page load times and errors from your browser session.

name: Sentry
description: Error tracking that captures JavaScript errors and may include a breadcrumb trail of your recent actions.

name: Cloudflare Insights
description: Cloudflare's analytics that measures page load speed and visitor counts — minimal personal data collected.

name: Braze
description: Customer engagement platform that tracks your behavior to power personalized push notifications and emails.

name: Klaviyo
description: Email marketing tracker — links your site visits to your email address for personalized campaign targeting.

name: Chartbeat
description: Real-time analytics for news sites — tracks which articles you read and for how long.

name: Comscore
description: Audience measurement company — aggregates your browsing data to sell demographic reports to media companies.

name: Nielsen
description: Collects audience data to measure reach and sell market research — your visit contributes to Nielsen ratings.

name: LiveRamp
description: Data broker that links your browsing to your real identity and sells that linkage to advertisers.

name: Twilio SendGrid
description: Email delivery service — the tracking pixel in emails reports back to the sender when you opened them.

name: Xandr / AppNexus
description: One of the largest programmatic ad exchanges — your data is auctioned to advertisers in milliseconds as pages load.

name: OpenX
description: A programmatic ad exchange that auctions your data to bidding advertisers as you load the page.

name: Magnite / Rubicon Project
description: A sell-side ad platform that brokers your data between publishers and advertisers in real time.

name: Index Exchange
description: Programmatic ad exchange that connects publishers and advertisers by sharing your browsing profile.

name: PubMatic
description: Ad exchange platform that syncs your identity across advertising networks for targeted bidding.

name: Sovrn
description: Ad network and data platform that tracks your content interests to serve targeted ads.

name: The Trade Desk
description: A large demand-side platform — syncs tracking cookies across ad networks to build a profile of you.

name: MediaMath
description: Programmatic ad platform that uses a 'math tag' to match your identity across ad networks.

name: Lotame
description: Data management platform that aggregates your demographic and behavioral data for ad targeting.

name: Oracle BlueKai
description: Oracle's data marketplace — collects your browsing to build audience segments sold to advertisers.

name: AdRoll
description: Retargeting platform — tracks your visits so you see ads for this site after you leave.

name: Moat (Oracle)
description: Ad measurement tool that tracks whether you actually saw an ad — collects detailed attention metrics.

name: Integral Ad Science (IAS)
description: Ad verification service that monitors your interactions with ads to confirm they were actually viewed.

name: DoubleVerify
description: Ad verification tracker that confirms ad viewability and measures your engagement with ads.

name: Kochava
description: Mobile measurement and attribution platform — links your web behavior to mobile app installs.

name: Adjust
description: Mobile attribution tracker — connects your web activity to app installs and in-app behavior.

name: AppsFlyer
description: Mobile attribution platform — tracks which ads and websites drove you to install or use an app.

name: Branch
description: Deep linking and attribution tool — tracks your path from web to mobile app across devices.

name: Conversant
description: Personalized ad network that builds individual profiles of your interests for targeted retargeting.

name: GumGum
description: In-image advertising platform that analyzes the images you view to serve contextually relevant ads.

name: Revcontent
description: Content recommendation ad network — tracks your reading habits to serve sponsored articles.

name: MGID
description: Native advertising platform that places sponsored content based on your browsing interests.

name: 33Across
description: Ad tech company that uses social data to build audience segments and target ads across the web.

name: SpotX
description: Video advertising platform that auctions your data for targeted video ad placements.

name: FreeWheel
description: TV and streaming video ad platform — tracks your video viewing behavior for ad targeting.

name: ID5
description: Cross-site identity resolution — creates a persistent ID linking your activity across publishers.

name: LiveIntent
description: Links your email address to your browsing behavior to target ads based on emails you've opened.

name: Audigent
description: Audience data platform that builds identity graphs to match you across devices for ad targeting.

name: Zeotap
description: Customer intelligence platform that links your first-party data to third-party identity graphs.

name: Matomo / Piwik
description: Open-source analytics platform — often self-hosted and more privacy-friendly than Google Analytics, but still tracks visits.

name: Woopra
description: Customer journey analytics that tracks individual users across your entire product lifecycle.

name: Kissmetrics
description: Ties your anonymous visits to your identity once you sign up — creating a persistent record of your behavior.

name: Inspectlet
description: Records screen-capture videos of your sessions and tracks eye movement patterns.

name: Clicky
description: Real-time web analytics that tracks individual visitor sessions including heatmaps.

name: StatCounter
description: Web analytics service that logs every page view along with your browser, OS, and location.

name: Parse.ly
description: Content analytics for media sites — tracks which articles you read and how long you spent on each.

name: Pendo
description: Product analytics that tracks every click inside a web app to help companies understand feature usage.

name: Tealium
description: Tag management and data platform that routes your behavioral data to dozens of other tracking tools.

name: mParticle
description: Customer data platform that collects your behavior and fans it out to advertising and analytics services.

name: PostHog
description: Open-source product analytics that records events, replays sessions, and runs feature experiments.

name: Contentsquare
description: Digital experience analytics — records how you scroll, move, and interact with every element on the page.

name: AB Tasty
description: A/B testing and personalization platform that shows different page variants to different users.

name: Dynamic Yield
description: Personalization engine that changes what content you see based on your profile and prior behavior.

name: Eloqua (Oracle)
description: B2B marketing automation that scores you as a sales prospect based on your web activity.

name: ActiveCampaign
description: Email marketing and CRM that ties your site visits to your email address for automated follow-ups.

name: Mailchimp
description: Email marketing platform — tracks email opens, link clicks, and sometimes on-site behavior for campaigns.

name: Drip
description: E-commerce email marketing that tracks your browsing and purchase behavior to trigger automated emails.

name: Iterable
description: Cross-channel marketing automation that builds a profile of your behavior to send personalized campaigns.

name: Emarsys (SAP)
description: E-commerce personalization platform that tracks your product views to recommend items and send triggered emails.

name: LiveChat
description: Live chat widget that logs your conversations and may track your on-site behavior before you chat.

name: Freshchat / Freshworks
description: Customer chat platform that tracks your activity on the site to provide context to support agents.

name: Olark
description: Live chat widget that shows support agents your current page, location, and browsing history on the site.

name: Tawk.to
description: Free live chat service that tracks visitor activity and shows agents your page history in real time.

name: Tidio
description: Live chat and chatbot widget that tracks your behavior on the site before and during support conversations.

name: Crisp
description: Customer messaging platform that tracks your browsing session to give agents context about your visit.

name: Help Scout
description: Customer support tool whose beacon widget logs your visits and links them to your support history.

name: YouTube Embeds
description: Embedded YouTube videos let Google track which videos you watch and link that to your Google account.

name: Vimeo Embeds
description: Embedded Vimeo videos can track your viewing behavior and link it to your Vimeo account if logged in.

name: Twitter / X Widgets
description: Embedded tweets and follow buttons let Twitter track your visit even if you don't click anything.

name: Typekit / Adobe Fonts
description: Adobe's font hosting service — logs which pages use their fonts, which can function as a tracking beacon.

name: Spotify Embeds
description: Embedded Spotify players let Spotify know which sites you visit and what content you listen to.

name: Bugsnag
description: Error monitoring that captures crash reports and may include a trail of recent user actions as context.

name: Rollbar
description: Error tracking service that logs JavaScript errors and includes breadcrumbs of your prior actions.

name: Dynatrace
description: Application performance monitoring with real user monitoring — captures timing data from your browser session.

name: Lucky Orange
description: Session recording and heatmap tool — watches your every move on the page including typed text in some cases.

name: Customer.io
description: Behavioral email platform — tracks your actions on the site to trigger automated, personalized email sequences.

name: Teads
description: Video and native ad network embedded inside article content — tracks which ads you view and for how long.

name: Unruly
description: Programmatic video ad network that measures your emotional response and engagement with video ads.

name: Tremor Video
description: Video advertising platform that tracks how much of each video ad you watched.

name: TripleLift
description: Native advertising exchange that matches sponsored content to your interests and tracks your clicks.

name: Sharethrough
description: Native ad platform that places sponsored content in editorial feeds — tracks your engagement with each unit.

name: Nativo
description: Native advertising platform that serves branded content within editorial pages and tracks how you interact with it.

name: Connatix
description: Video content and advertising platform that tracks which videos you watch and uses that to serve targeted ads.

name: Innovid
description: Connected TV and video ad measurement — tracks which TV and streaming ads you've been exposed to.

name: Yahoo / Oath DSP
description: Yahoo's advertising platform — tracks your browsing to serve targeted display and video ads across the Yahoo network.

name: Quora Pixel
description: Tells Quora what you did on this site so it can target you with ads based on your browsing intent.

name: Wistia
description: Video hosting platform that tells site owners exactly how much of each video you watched and where you dropped off.

name: Vidyard
description: Sales video platform that notifies salespeople when you watch their video and for how long — used to time follow-up calls.

name: JW Player
description: Video player with built-in analytics that tracks watch time, completion rate, and which ads you see.

name: Brightcove
description: Enterprise video platform that logs detailed analytics on your video viewing behavior.

name: Leadfeeder / Dealfront
description: B2B tracker that identifies which company you work for based on your IP address and reports it to the site owner.

name: Albacross
description: B2B visitor identification — tells site owners what company you work for so they can target you as a sales lead.

name: Clearbit Reveal
description: Identifies the company behind your IP address and enriches that with firmographic data for sales targeting.

name: Demandbase
description: Account-based marketing platform that identifies your company and serves targeted ads to your entire organization.

name: 6sense
description: B2B intent data platform that tracks your research behavior to predict buying intent and target your company with ads.

name: Adobe Analytics (Omniture)
description: Enterprise analytics suite that tracks detailed behavioral data and funnel metrics, often for large media and e-commerce sites.

name: Adobe Audience Manager
description: Data management platform that builds audience segments from your behavior and sells them to advertisers.

name: Neustar / TransUnion
description: Identity resolution and data enrichment — links your online behavior to offline consumer data held by TransUnion.

name: Acxiom
description: One of the world's largest data brokers — holds detailed consumer profiles and sells them to advertisers.

name: Perfect Audience
description: Retargeting platform — follows you around the web with ads after you visit a site.

name: Salesloft
description: Sales engagement platform that can track which pages of a site a prospect visits to help salespeople time outreach.

name: Outreach.io
description: Sales automation tool that tracks email opens, link clicks, and can monitor which pages you visit.

name: Samba TV
description: TV audience measurement that links your TV viewing habits to your online browsing for cross-screen ad targeting.

name: GoSquared
description: Real-time analytics and CRM that tracks individual visitor sessions and links them to customer profiles.

name: etracker
description: European web analytics platform that tracks page views, clicks, and conversion funnels.

name: Histats
description: Web statistics tracker that logs your visit, IP address, browser, and referral source.

name: Yieldmo
description: Mobile ad platform that tracks your attention and scroll behavior to measure ad engagement.

name: Smart AdServer
description: Ad serving platform that manages display and video ad delivery, tracking impressions and click-through rates.

name: Extreme Reach
description: Ad delivery and measurement platform that tracks whether you completed a video ad.

name: Pubstack
description: Publisher ad revenue optimization tool that monitors your interactions with every ad slot on the page.

name: Seedtag
description: Contextual advertising platform that analyzes the article content you're reading to serve relevant ads.

name: Fathom Analytics
description: Privacy-first analytics — tracks page views and referrers without storing personal data or using cookies.

name: Simple Analytics
description: Cookie-free analytics that counts visits without tracking individuals — one of the more privacy-respecting options.

name: Plausible
description: Lightweight, privacy-respecting analytics — no cookies, no personal data, just aggregated page view counts.

name: Adform
description: European ad server and exchange that sets cross-site cookies to track you across publisher sites for audience targeting.

name: BidSwitch
description: Programmatic plumbing layer connecting ad buyers and sellers — syncs your identity across dozens of ad platforms simultaneously.

name: Amobee
description: Demand-side platform that tracks your conversions and browsing to run retargeting campaigns across digital and TV.

name: DataXu / Roku OneView
description: Programmatic ad platform that connects your web browsing data to your Roku TV viewing for cross-screen ad targeting.

name: Undertone / Perion
description: High-impact ad network serving large-format display and video units — uses cookies and pixels to track engagement.

name: EMX Digital
description: Header bidding exchange that auctions your browser profile to advertisers as pages load.

name: RhythmOne
description: Programmatic video and display ad marketplace that collects behavioral data to power audience-targeted campaigns.

name: Zedo
description: Ad serving and management platform that sets persistent cookies to track your browsing across publisher sites.

name: LoopMe
description: AI-driven brand advertising platform that uses your mobile data and location signals to target and measure video ads.

name: AppLovin
description: Mobile advertising giant that tracks your app installs and in-app behavior across thousands of apps to power targeted ads.

name: InMobi
description: Mobile ad network using device fingerprinting and first-party signals to measure and target ads across apps and mobile web.

name: Digital Turbine
description: App delivery and mobile advertising platform that tracks which apps you install and use to optimize ad delivery.

name: Unity Ads / IronSource
description: Game and app advertising network that tracks your in-app behavior and purchase history to target ads within mobile games.

name: Kargo
description: Premium mobile and CTV ad platform that measures how long you look at ads and tracks attention across sites.

name: Bombora
description: B2B intent data cooperative — aggregates your reading behavior across business publishing sites to flag you as an in-market buyer.

name: Carbon Ads
description: Developer and design-focused ad network that tracks your visits to tech sites to serve relevant ads.

name: BuySellAds
description: Direct ad marketplace serving display and native ads — tracks impressions and clicks across publisher sites.

name: Ezoic
description: AI-driven ad optimization platform that runs A/B tests on ad placements and tracks detailed user behavior for revenue maximization.

name: Mediavine
description: Publisher ad management platform that runs programmatic auctions on every page load, sharing your data with dozens of ad partners.

name: Raptive / AdThrive
description: Premium publisher ad network managing programmatic auctions for lifestyle and food blogs — shares your data with multiple demand partners.

name: Skimlinks
description: Automatically converts product links on editorial pages into affiliate links — tracks which products you click and buy to earn commissions.

name: VigLink / Sovrn Commerce
description: Intercepts your clicks on outbound product links to insert affiliate tracking, recording which retailers you visit.

name: Impact
description: Partnership management platform that tracks your path from a referral link to a purchase across devices.

name: CJ Affiliate
description: One of the world's largest affiliate networks — tracks your clicks and purchases to attribute commissions to referring publishers.

name: Rakuten Advertising
description: Affiliate network that routes your clicks through Rakuten's tracking domain to log conversions and pay publishers.

name: Awin
description: Global affiliate network that drops a MasterTag on advertiser sites to track every click and purchase from referring publishers.

name: ShareASale
description: Affiliate marketing network tracking your clicks through publisher links to attribute conversions and calculate commissions.

name: PartnerStack
description: B2B partner program platform that tracks your referral source and purchase journey to credit the right partner.

name: TUNE / HasOffers
description: Mobile marketing measurement platform that tracks app install campaigns by logging clicks and attributing installs to ad sources.

name: Singular
description: Mobile attribution platform that uses SKAdNetwork and probabilistic matching to link your ad clicks to app installs.

name: Rockerbox
description: Marketing attribution platform that tracks your full customer journey — every touchpoint from first click to purchase.

name: Northbeam
description: Multi-touch attribution tool that tracks every ad interaction you had before buying to help advertisers understand what influenced you.

name: Triple Whale
description: E-commerce attribution platform that tracks your path from ad click to purchase and assigns credit across channels.

name: Smartlook
description: Session recording and product analytics tool that captures every click, scroll, and rage-click on your session.

name: Glassbox
description: Enterprise session replay platform used by banks and insurers — records your complete digital journey including form interactions.

name: Quantum Metric
description: Real-user monitoring and session replay platform that captures your clicks and form inputs to diagnose conversion problems.

name: Decibel Insight
description: Digital experience analytics recording your mouse movements, scrolling, and frustration signals like rage clicks.

name: SessionCam
description: Session recording and replay tool that captures your complete browsing path including what you typed in forms.

name: Sprig
description: In-product survey and session replay tool — triggers micro-surveys based on your in-app behavior and records your responses.

name: Appcues
description: User onboarding platform that tracks which product tours and tooltips you interact with to measure feature adoption.

name: WalkMe
description: Digital adoption platform that records how you navigate software — every click, step completion, and abandonment.

name: Chameleon
description: Product tour and onboarding tool that tracks which tutorials you start, complete, or skip to optimize the user experience.

name: Constant Contact
description: Email marketing platform that routes every link in its emails through a tracking domain to log when you click and what you opened.

name: Campaign Monitor
description: Email marketing tool that tracks which emails you open and which links you click using tracking pixels and redirect URLs.

name: Brevo / Sendinblue
description: Email and SMS marketing platform with on-site tracker that records your page visits and links them to your email address.

name: Omnisend
description: E-commerce marketing platform that tracks your browsing and purchase behavior to trigger automated email and SMS sequences.

name: Attentive
description: SMS marketing platform with an on-site pixel that monitors your browsing and purchase behavior to trigger personalized text messages.

name: Postscript
description: SMS marketing tool for e-commerce that tracks your browsing and cart activity to send automated text message campaigns.

name: Yotpo
description: Reviews, loyalty, and SMS platform that tracks which reviews you read and links your purchase history to your marketing profile.

name: Bazaarvoice
description: User-generated content platform that tracks which reviews and Q&As you read, and feeds that data into retail analytics.

name: Trustpilot Widget
description: Review widget that tracks your engagement with star ratings and reviews, and can trigger post-purchase survey invitations.

name: LivePerson
description: AI-powered chat platform that uses third-party cookies to recognize you across sessions and personalize conversations.

name: Gorgias
description: E-commerce customer support tool that tracks your order history and browsing activity to give agents full context before you say a word.

name: Kustomer
description: CRM-based support platform (owned by Meta) that builds a unified profile of your purchases, visits, and support history.

name: SoundCloud Embeds
description: Embedded music players let SoundCloud track which tracks you listen to and for how long across every site using their player.

name: Twitch Embeds
description: Embedded Twitch streams and clips let Amazon track your viewing behavior even when you're not on Twitch.

name: Tumblr
description: Embedded Tumblr content and the reblog button let Tumblr track which posts you interact with across the web.

name: Substack
description: Newsletter platform that tracks which embedded posts you read and whether you subscribe, across all sites embedding Substack content.

name: Klarna
description: Buy-now-pay-later service that tracks your browsing behavior across shopping sites to build a financial profile and offer personalized credit.

name: Affirm
description: BNPL lending service that tracks which products you view and consider purchasing to assess creditworthiness and personalize offers.

name: Afterpay / Clearpay
description: Buy-now-pay-later service that tracks your shopping behavior and purchase history across all sites using the Afterpay checkout button.

name: Nosto
description: E-commerce personalization engine that tracks your browsing and purchase history to power 'Recommended for you' sections.

name: Barilliance
description: E-commerce personalization and cart abandonment platform that tracks every product you view to trigger targeted emails.

name: Qualtrics
description: Experience management platform that triggers surveys based on your behavior and tracks your responses alongside your visit data.

name: SurveyMonkey
description: Survey platform embedded in sites to collect feedback — logs your IP, browser, and response data when you participate.

name: Medallia
description: Customer experience platform that tracks your digital interactions and triggers feedback surveys at key moments in your journey.

name: Typeform
description: Interactive survey platform that tracks which questions you answer, skip, or abandon to improve form completion rates.

name: Delighted
description: NPS and CSAT survey tool that triggers feedback requests based on your usage and links your score to your customer profile.

name: UserVoice
description: Product feedback widget that tracks which features you request and vote on, linking that to your user account.

name: AppDynamics
description: Application performance monitoring that captures detailed browser timing and error data from your session.

name: Raygun
description: Error and crash reporting tool that logs JavaScript errors in your browser along with a trail of your recent actions.

name: TrackJS
description: JavaScript error monitoring that records the sequence of user actions leading up to a bug to help developers reproduce it.

name: Airbrake
description: Error monitoring service that captures browser errors and includes context about your recent actions as debugging breadcrumbs.

name: ZoomInfo
description: B2B data platform that identifies your company from your IP address and reports your visit to the site owner as a sales lead.

name: iSpot.tv
description: TV attribution platform that uses invisible pixels to link your website visits to TV ads you were exposed to, matching by IP.

name: Algolia Insights
description: Tracks which search results you click on and what you purchase after searching, to personalize future search rankings for you.

name: Google Maps API
description: Embedded Google Maps tells Google which sites you visit that use maps and can log your location interactions.

name: Mapbox
description: Mapping platform that logs API usage metrics including your location interactions and the referring site.

name: Stripe Radar
description: Stripe's fraud detection network collects detailed browser fingerprint data including your device, plugins, and behavior patterns.

name: PayPal Tracking
description: PayPal's analytics scripts track your behavior on merchant sites to detect fraud and personalize checkout experiences.

name: Cloudfront Trackers
description: Amazon's CDN sometimes hosts third-party tracking scripts — when present, requests go through Amazon's infrastructure.

name: SessionStack
description: Session replay and product analytics tool that records your complete browsing session as a video-like replay for debugging.

name: UserGuiding
description: User onboarding platform that tracks which product tours you engage with and monitors your feature adoption over time.

name: Pendo Feedback
description: In-app NPS and feature request tool that links your feedback to your usage data to prioritize product decisions.

name: Oribi
description: No-code analytics platform acquired by LinkedIn that tracks your behavioral events and funnels without requiring engineering work.

name: Heap.io (Server-side)
description: Auto-captures every interaction you make — clicks, form submissions, page views — without the site needing to define events in advance.

name: Mouseflow Heatmaps
description: Records individual sessions and aggregates mouse movement data into heatmaps showing exactly where users look and click.
